parsed.generic_mechanism: Belief change accumulates when conclusions follow progressively developed causal explanations; reversing that sequence makes evidence feel disconnected and promises unearned.

paraphrased_evidence.A: The chapters connect conditioned reward, short-lived relief, metabolic rebound, and failed restriction, gradually recasting consumption as a self-renewing trap while presenting abstinence as recovered choice.
paraphrased_evidence.B: The same potentially persuasive ideas appear in reverse and fragmented order, so summaries precede development, conclusions precede premises, and freedom claims arrive without a readable path that earns them.

paraphrased_evidence.ours: The same potentially persuasive ideas appear in reverse and fragmented order, so summaries precede development, conclusions precede premises, and freedom claims arrive without a readable path that earns them.
paraphrased_evidence.ref: The chapters connect conditioned reward, short-lived relief, metabolic rebound, and failed restriction, gradually recasting consumption as a self-renewing trap while presenting abstinence as recovered choice.
